scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/db generate && bun run --cwd apps/genbooks build
scripts.build:genbooks: bun run --cwd packages/db generate && bun run --cwd apps/genbooks build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/pdf-pipeline test && bun run --cwd apps/genbooks test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/pdf-pipeline typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/db typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/genbooks typecheck
